sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90552" key="protre/fw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προτρέφω</orth>, <sense id="n90552.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nourish, feed before</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:9:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
